arts.ttl: Dimarco rejects Manchester United, commits future to Inter
arts.sum: Federico Dimarco, Inter Milan's star left-back, has once again demonstrated his unwavering loyalty to the Nerazzurri by rejecting advances from Manchester United. The Italian international, known for his passionate support of Inter, seems determined to cement his status as a club legend rather than pursue opportunities elsewhere. The post Dimarco rejects Manchester United, commits future to Inter appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man Utd are better with Rashford - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim says the club are "better" with Marcus Rashford after the striker suggests he could leave Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: €95m striker one step CLOSER to Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: €95m striker one step CLOSER to Man Utd transfer Kolo Muani has also been linked with a move back to the Bundesliga in the form of a transfer to RB Leipzig, while several Premier League sides, including Arsenal and Man Utd, have also been associated with him.

arts.ttl: Man United targeting Nico Williams as 'potential star signing' to replace Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly targeting a potential move for Nico Williams after identifying the Athletic Bilbao star as a replacement for Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford must avoid Cristiano Ronaldo's exit plan to keep Man United promise
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Marcus Rashford confirmed on Tuesday that he is ready for a new challenge away from Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker claims Marcus Rashford 'has not been as special as he can be' but it is not all the Man United star's fault... as fellow pundit Alan Shearer insists the club 'can't afford to carry any passengers'
arts.sum: The forward conducted a candid interview with Henry Winter on Tuesday where he revealed that it was a matter of 'when' not 'if' regarding his departure from Old Trafford, having been dropped on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 'Wasted potential' - Marcus Rashford transfer verdict and the realistic fee Man United can expect
arts.sum: Rashford's future at Manchester United is uncertain after the forward declared he is ready for a "new challenge" after being dropped for the Manchester derby - but is selling him a mistake?

arts.ttl: Why Amorim’s response to Marcus Rashford was PERFECT for Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s response to the Marcus Rashford crisis underlined the fact that he is the perfect figurehead for Manchester United . Rashford, however, brought the first real challenge of the Portuguese’s time at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: 'It sounds a bit weird but': Archie Gray shares what he now thinks of his Tottenham teammates

arts.ttl: What Marcus Rashford did moments before dropping Man United transfer bombshell speaks volumes
arts.sum: Manchester United news as the background to Marcus Rashford's exit interview says just as much as his words
